response:
To speed up the registration of an Avatrombopag medicinal product in [Country A] and reduce the time and costs of conducting bioequivalence studies, we offer to conduct an international clinical trial that includes [Country A] as an additional site for patient recruitment. For this, we will need the following from your team:

1. Access to the full clinical trial protocol currently being used in [Country B], so we can align our methodologies and ensure consistency in data collection and analysis.
2. Results and data from the bioequivalence studies conducted with your participants, which will serve as a crucial benchmark for our integrated analysis.

Based on the combined data, we will prepare a summary report on the clinical trial for registration in [Country A].
